# Roncyo (roncyo.com)

> Roncyo is a publishing and monetization platform for games and websites. This site is introduction and partner documentation — not a public free-play game catalog.

## What Roncyo does

Publish games and sites, distribute inventory with partners, and monetize with advertising (including ads.txt / authorized demand such as Google AdSense on web properties).

## What this site is

- Product introduction: https://roncyo.com/
- Documentation: https://roncyo.com/docs
- About: https://roncyo.com/about
- Partnerships / support: https://roncyo.com/support

## What this site is not

Roncyo.com is not a consumer arcade or game directory. Players do not browse or trial a public game catalog here.

## Documentation

| Doc | URL |
|-----|-----|
| Platform overview | https://roncyo.com/docs/overview |
| Publishing & distribution | https://roncyo.com/docs/publishing |
| Ads & revenue | https://roncyo.com/docs/monetization |
| ads.txt setup | https://roncyo.com/docs/ads-txt |
| Technical integration | https://roncyo.com/docs/integration |

## Compliance pages (store / Mini App)

Per-title privacy and support URLs may exist under `/games/[slug]/privacy` and `/games/[slug]/support` when required by stores — these are not a play catalog.

## Legal

- Privacy: https://roncyo.com/privacy-policy
- Terms: https://roncyo.com/terms-of-service
- Cookie policy: https://roncyo.com/cookie-policy
- Data deletion: https://roncyo.com/data-deletion

## Contact

Email: support@roncyo.com

Related AI file: https://roncyo.com/ai.txt
